name: cortex
description: Cortex — SDLC Automation Engine. 47 commands, 13 agents, 19 skills, 7 hooks, 16 reference docs. Forge production-ready software from idea to deployment with zero human intervention. Self-contained meta-process skills (brainstorming, planning, TDD, debugging, verification) and scaffolders for apps, standalone MCP servers, and Claude Code plugins themselves.
